programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Dragnet 804
programme.desc: Dragnet 804

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble flees Los Angeles with a woman who loves him after checking out a lead on some one-armed man but Lt Gerard is right on their trail

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike helps the US Coast Guard in trapping enemy agents that are dropping microfilm canisters in an underwater cave

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mikes assignment Retrieve a deadly radioactive capsule and restore it to a lead container without exposing himself to gamma radiation that could take his life

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: When a bombardier releases his bombs prematurely with the group ordered to hit the same spot they accidentally destroy a Dutch school

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A female artists nightmares cause her to lose herself in self-pity mixed with egotism

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: An indebted conman meats his match

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick chases a psychopath who is burning people alive and tries to protect the targets of the killers rage -- a band of homeless living under the citys streets

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki investigate the apparent suicides of a handful of ballet dancers and soon learn that they may be linked to a rare music box

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa defies the city road commissioner when he decides to take matters into his own hands by fixing a pesky hole in the road in front of his house

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A conflict arises between Luke and Kate when Grandpa monopolizes all of Lukes free time but Grandpa decides to make amends after Pepino makes him aware that he is the source of the problem

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After the death of the head CONTROL scientist Max finds that he wasnt the brains behind his discoveries

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max temporarily takes over for a king that looks exactly like him in a parody of The Prisoner of Zenda Ah yes I remember the well

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Hogans 230
programme.desc: Hogans 230

programme.title: Hogans 304
programme.desc: Hogans 304

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called bliss via a Taelon device They discover it is widespread With an instantly strong addictive property the addicts are dying within 48 hours The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While exploring a cavern in an asteroid the Alphans release Balor a sadistic alien who has achieved immortality

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Chey 510

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Young Paul is torn between Lt Stones efforts to take him off the streets and go to college and his brother part of a street gang One day he witnesses the head of the gang committing a murder on an rivaling street gang boss His brother convinces him in joining the gang and to kill Mike Stone who has started to investigate on the murder case in the scene

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is deputized to transport a suspected killer of a man and his wife to the county seat along with witnesses who want to lynch the prisoner

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: Truckers form a mile-long convoy in support of a truckers vendetta with an abusive sheriff - Based on the country song of the same title by CW McCall

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mikhail Ragozin v. Alan Bispo de Santana

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Yassin Baitar v. Jonay Risco

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Luke Theriault v. Mike Wright

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Shayna Baszler

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mindaugas Mikaliak v. Adrian Kubiak

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexey Makhno v. Michel Silva

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Georgina van der Linden v. Samantha Van Doorn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Zach Darling v. Jason Diep

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Harry Davies v. Evgeny Belovs

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Cory Knipe has been a professional MMA fighter since 2010. One of his biggest challenges has been to learn to effectively balance work and his MMA training. At HK36, he is up against heavy hitter Anton Tokarchuk in the Light Heavyweight Co-Main event.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: James Saville v. Martin Sheridan

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Harry Davies v. Evgeny Belovs

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.
